entities.name: SORGHUM BICOLOR
entities.description: The primary crop species studied for LEA gene identification and expression analysis

entities.name: LEA GENES
entities.description: Late embryogenesis abundant genes, a group of 68 genes belonging to 8 families in Sorghum bicolor

entities.name: LEA PROTEINS
entities.description: Hydrophilic protective proteins that act as space fillers or molecular shields during plant development and abiotic stress

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental stress conditions that trigger the expression of LEA genes

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Living environmental stress conditions associated with W-Box cis-elements

entities.name: LEA-2
entities.description: A typical hydrophobic family of LEA genes and the most abundant family in Sorghum bicolor

entities.name: SEGMENTAL DUPLICATION
entities.description: A process of gene duplication that played an important role in the expansion of the LEA-2 family

entities.name: ARABIDOPSIS
entities.description: A model plant used for ortholog comparison with Sorghum bicolor LEA genes

entities.name: ORYZA SATIVA
entities.description: Rice, used for ortholog comparison with Sorghum bicolor LEA genes

entities.name: CHLOROPLAST
entities.description: The subcellular location where majority of LEA proteins are targeted

entities.name: MIRNAS
entities.description: MicroRNAs that target SbLEA genes and participate in development and abiotic stress tolerance

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand abiotic stress, mediated by LEA proteins and miRNAs

entities.name: DRE
entities.description: An abiotic stress-responsive cis-element found in the promoter of LEA genes

entities.name: MYB
entities.description: An abiotic stress-responsive cis-element found in the promoter of LEA genes

entities.name: MYC
entities.description: An abiotic stress-responsive cis-element found in the promoter of LEA genes

entities.name: GT1
entities.description: An abiotic stress-responsive cis-element found in the promoter of LEA genes

entities.name: W-BOX
entities.description: A biotic stress-responsive cis-element found in the promoter of LEA genes

entities.name: ABA
entities.description: A hormone-responsive cis-element found in the promoter of LEA genes

entities.name: ERE
entities.description: A hormone-responsive cis-element found in the promoter of LEA genes

entities.name: TGA
entities.description: A hormone-responsive cis-element found in the promoter of LEA genes

entities.name: SKN
entities.description: A development-responsive cis-element found in the promoter of LEA genes

entities.name: MICROARRAY
entities.description: A technique used to analyze the tissue-specific expression of 65 SbLEA genes

entities.name: QRT-PCR
entities.description: A technique used to analyze the expression of 23 SbLEA genes in various tissues

entities.name: ROOTS
entities.description: Plant tissue where LEA genes are expressed

entities.name: STEMS
entities.description: Plant tissue where LEA genes are expressed, showing higher expression than roots and leaves

entities.name: LEAVES
entities.description: Plant tissue where LEA genes are expressed

entities.name: SBLEA3-2
entities.description: A regulator gene within the LEA family that shows abundant expression under diverse stress conditions
